fields.title: Ralph archive misclassifies task files whose basename starts with archive
fields.description: In extensions/tau/src/ralph/index.ts, the archive command decides whether a task file is already under the archive directory by checking `!srcTask.startsWith(archiveDir(ctx.cwd))`. A task path like `.pi/ralph/archiveable.md` shares that string prefix even though it is not inside `.pi/ralph/archive/`, so Ralph skips moving the task file during archive.
fields.design: Use path-aware containment checks rather than a raw string prefix, so only files actually inside `.pi/ralph/archive/` are treated as archived.
